xml.log: If there is an update when the file file is missing, go to Steam Client - Library List - mydockfinder - right-click menu - Properties - Local File - Verify software file integrity If the desktop icon is not displayed after enabling pre-stage scheduling, you can right-click on the desktop-view-display desktop icon to enable display desktop icon If using MSI afterburner will cause irregular freezing or crashing issues, you can set it in MSI afterburner, add dock_64.exe, then select dock_64.exe, and finally select "None" on the right side. Changelog ·Brand-new compilation method improves stability ·Fixed memory leak issues in some system graphics card drivers from previous versions (to be tested) ·Optimized D3D resource release to improve stability ·Fixed issue in the last version where ALT + F4 shutdown menu and scheduled shutdown weren't working ·Fixed issue present in all previous versions where dragging and dropping files onto the dock would prevent minimizing the window by clicking the dock icon ·Fixed crashes caused by interface rendering in previous versions ·Fixed issue in the last version where dock icons displayed incorrectly after waking the screen from shutdown ·Fixed rendering issues in the last version’s weather forecast window when three or more cities were displayed ·Fixed crashes in all previous versions when moving the mouse quickly back and forth across the dock while high-quality rendering icons were enabled ·Fixed sunrise/sunset recognition errors on startup when auto-switching between light and dark modes in previous versions ·Fixed freezing issue when restarting the program from Preferences in the last version ·Fixed rendering stutter due to CPU scheduling in earlier test versions ·Fixed crashes in all previous versions caused by moving sliders too fast with the mouse ·Adjusted window minimizing interception mechanism, fixing issues in all previous versions where some systems didn’t show minimize animations after UAC was turned off ·Fixed WiFi list not refreshing in previous versions ·Fixed mismatch between clicked WiFi name and actual connected WiFi in all previous versions ·Fixed freezing issue when editing lyrics if the player’s lyrics window was too wide in previous versions ·Fixed issue in the last version where high-quality rendered icons didn’t display for original icons smaller than 128 pixels ·Optimized UWP screenshot code ·Fixed dock icon progress bar remnants ·Fixed crashes caused by some system explorer interfaces ·Fixed incomplete display of left-side icons in the advanced icon editing interface in the last version ·Added a power icon in desktop Finder for switching power management; on Windows 11, if only Balanced power management exists, you can choose Power Saver, Balanced, or Performance, and added a Power Saver mode hint on the battery/power icon ·Fixed garbled rendering of dock icons with HDR enabled in all previous versions.After this update, you'll need to edit the icon again for it to display properly. ·Fixed garbled display of oversized tray icons in some programs in the last version ·Fixed tray icon flickering and freezing of MyFinder after long standby
